hero.title: Le Gaulois
hero.subtitle: Chef Jérôme Paquin's table
hero.tagline: A cuisine that awakens the senses — where tradition meets inspiration

intro.title: Off the beaten path
intro.body: From childhood memories to the subtle harmonies crafted by self-taught Head Chef Jérôme Paquin, let yourself be carried away by intoxicating flavours. The menu evolves over time, working with raw, seasonal, fresh and mostly local products.

chef.title: Jérôme Paquin
chef.body: A self-taught, passionate chef, Jérôme Paquin tirelessly renovates the space and seeks out innovation. He stands out for his pursuit of gastronomic excellence, offering original and creative cuisine with unusual culinary pairings, in a carefully crafted atmosphere.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.subtitle: Net price, service included

formulas.name: Menu « à faire »
formulas.note: Tuesday to Friday — lunch only (excluding public holidays)

formulas.name: Little Gourmet Menu
formulas.note: Up to 11 years old — a dish of their choice & a scoop of homemade ice cream

formulas.name: Plant-based Discovery Menu
formulas.note: 4-course menu without meat or fish, selected by the Chef

formulas.name: Inspiration Menu
formulas.note: 4 courses selected by the Chef, served for the whole table. Can be combined with the plant-based menu

formulas.name: Tasting Menu
formulas.note: 8 courses for the whole table — between land and sea, from here and elsewhere. Subject to time restrictions

items.name: Veal
items.description: Vitello tonnato-style with caesar sauce, red onion variations, house-made Kaviari caviar

items.name: A Childhood Memory
items.description: Ham pasta shells risotto-style, elevated by a 65°C free-range egg, roasted onion and pork rind emulsion, truffles

items.name: Duck foie gras from Ferme du Puntoun
items.description: Semi-cooked, sauerkraut and bitter beer condiments, brewer's grain tuile

items.name: Corn and Mushroom
items.description: A study of corn in texture, paired with wild mushrooms

items.name: Skrei Cod
items.description: Slow-cooked confit in olive oil, honey-glazed endive, citrus and beurre blanc sauce

items.name: Scallops
items.description: Seared on one side, parsley root variations, hazelnuts, reduced coral jus

items.name: Beef / Langoustine
items.description: Slow-cooked ribeye, raw-marinated langoustine, rösti-style potato, caviar and plant-based jus

items.name: Lamb
items.description: Slow-cooked shoulder, green asparagus, pea textures, tagine-style jus

items.name: Orchard-garden
items.description: A lemon meringue tart in disguise — everything but the appearance, with tarragon zest

items.name: The Mushroom
items.description: A walk through the undergrowth — a surprising pairing of mushroom, blueberry and hazelnut. Woody, green notes, lightly sweet

items.name: Like an Irish Coffee
items.description: Coffee ganache and mousse, a touch of whisky and the indulgence of truffle ice cream

items.name: Cheeses from Maître Antony in Vieux-Ferrette
items.description: Cheese trolley — plate of 3 cheeses (supplement in set menus)

menu.allergies_note: Please let us know of any dietary restrictions. We are unable to accommodate lactose-free diets — thank you for your understanding.

reserveCta.title: A table awaits you
reserveCta.body: Booking recommended by phone or email. We look forward to welcoming you.

contact.title: Contact & Booking
contact.address:
8 Rue du Général de Gaulle
68870 Bartenheim
contact.hours_closed: Closed: Thursday evening, Saturday lunch, Sunday evening, and all day Monday
